entries: Begin typing and select a place...

1
Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport
6000 N Terminal Pkwy Suite 4000, Atlanta, GA 30320, USA
85.2 mi
(800) 897-1910
4.1
By Car: 1 hour 43 min
From the airport get on I-75 North and go through Atlanta. Continue on I-75 North.
This turns into I-575 North to Canton - take the Exit to the right.
Continue through Canton. Before Jasper, I-575 turns into Hwy 515.
Continue through Jasper, Ellijay, and then you come to Blue Ridge.


Once in Blue Ridge, please use your turn-by-turn directions to get you safely to your cabin. Do not use GPS as it will get you lost in the mountains.
EDIT TIP

2
Chattanooga Airport
1001 Airport Rd, Chattanooga, TN 37421, USA
51.2 mi
(423) 855-2200
4.4
By Car: 1 hour 32 mins
EDIT TIP

entries: Begin typing and select a place...

1
Our Sample Itineraries
Need a little encouragement or an outline on how to navigate your next adventure? We've got you covered. Here are a couple of trip itineraries we've designed to cater to every possible occassion.
https://www.cabin-rentals-of-georgia.com/activities/trip-itineraries

2
Favorite Things To Do With Kids
Whether you are looking for indoor things to do or outdoor things to do, Blue Ridge and the North GA Mountains is the ultimate playground! Here is our list of favorite things to do with kids.
https://www.cabin-rentals-of-georgia.com/activity/seasonal-activities/family-things-to-do-blue-ridge-ga

3
Swinging Bridge on the Toccoa River
Swinging Bridge on the Toccoa River, Suches, GA 30572, USA
12.6 mi
4.8
Add a tip for your guests
ADD TIP

Fall Branch Falls Waterfall Hike
You are just within minutes of this beautiful waterfall hike off Aska Road. It's an easy hike for families and offers an observation deck for great viewing and photo opportunities.


DIRECTIONS: From Downtown Blue Ridge, E. First St. turns into Old Hwy 76 turn RIGHT on Aska Road (right after the Ace Hardware). Go about 8 miles and turn RIGHT on Stanley Creek Rd (the Toccoa Riverside Restaurant is directly across the street). Go 3 miles and you will see parking alongside the road. The trail head is on the right.
//www.youtube.com/embed/elzDRQi29Xg?rel=0&modestbranding=1

entries: Begin typing and select a place...

The Cabin Concierge
Add a special touch to your Blue Ridge vacation with The Cabin Concierge! Providing services from in-cabin massage to decor and charcuterie boards to grocery delivery, their local team is ready to help make the most of your experience. Browse their services, schedule an appointment, and relax.
https://www.brcabinconcierge.com/
